verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where were you Job When the sons of God shouted for joy And the morning stars sang Their happy song Do you recall at all Before the world was formed The feeling of being home where you belong

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Well, I'm sure Job must have wondered How we've forgotten such a day But with the Father's sweet reminder His soul began to say

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I remember the joy I remember the peace I remember the worship there Oh, what a sweet release I remember the love I was in the mind of God I remember, someway somehow It's all coming back to me now

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: What is it here where we live our lives When we accepted Christ That makes his children feel so set apart Why is it so, here below Just don't feel at home, no Like Someone somewhere else Still holds our hearts

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Well, there is a higher calling To where a Bride will take her flight And there ain't no way I'm gonna miss it Because His memory serves me right

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's all coming back to me…
